title: 神戸新聞杯の後に・取り戻したもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running in the Kobe Shimbun Hai, Silence
Suzuka appears lighter and refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bolstered by a newfound sense of unwavering
determination, Silence Suzuka sets her sights on
the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still needs more experience in order to reach
her lofty goals, so we decide to enter her into the
Kinko Sho next.
